news.title: Indonesian economy comes up for air but struggles to win back investors
news.summary: Indonesia's economy faces a perfect storm wrought by high energy prices, and while the currency has rebounded slightly, critics warn government policies are unnerving investors at a critical moment.President Prabowo Subianto's government is chasing a growth target of eight percent by 2029 as one of its major policy objectives -- an ambitious goal some experts warn would be hard to reach.
